title: Mourners vow revenge on Trump at funeral of Iran’s former supreme leader Ali Khamenei
summary_full: New supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei remained absent from public view as three of his brothers stood beside their father’s coffinCalls for the killing of Donald Trump were made beside the coffin of the assassinated former Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei at a packed prayer hall in Tehran on Sunday.Iran is staging a week of mass funeral processions ⁠for Khamenei, who was killed along with other members of his family on the first day of the US and Israeli war on 28 February. The funeral was delayed due to the war. Continue reading...
